pr.title: Record: Pre-Enrichment + Encoder Recurrence + XSA + SmearGate + BigramHash (val_bpb=1.1629)

output.summary: Uses GELU pre-enrichment with SmearGate/BigramHash, encoder-only recurrence between U-Net encoders, and XSA on later layers to sharpen contextual signals before decoding.
techniques: GELU widen-bottleneck embedding pre-enrichment with SmearGate + BigramHash
Encoder-only depth recurrence with RMS stabilization before decoder
XSA on last layers to project away self-value bias
